g.text: has six levels. In levels one, three, and ﬁve, the group sees
a single staﬀ, word/phrase, or image. In these cases, the room
should play a uniﬁed texture, shape, or sound.
In levels two, four, and six, the group is divided up into two halves.
Feel free to change which part you play, but listen for both parts!
The "diversions" mentioned earlier are links from one level to
another, and back again. This means the room will be suddenly
responding to a diﬀerent kind of prompt, and perhaps suddenly
Help make the group sound great!
